channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Woman JP Morgan executive Rapes and turns Male Employee into sex slave — 70 replies — 280.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Woman JP Morgan executive Rapes and turns Male Employee into sex slave

Open thread • Replies: 70 • Updated: 2026-04-30 17:55 UTC

OP

https://x.com/dailymail/status/2049618941043949691?s=46

A white woman JP Morgan Executive (mega international bank) drugged and raped a married man before taking pictures of him to use as blackmail.

She would force him to take drugs like viagra so she could fuck him longer. She started buying him gifts which as sex toys including anal ones which she forced him to use and got him a position where she had direct control over him and he acted as her assistant. She also pegged him.

He was crying over the situation and talking to authorities who didn’t believe him.

She was caught when police investigated her for ties to Trump and Epstein with her blackmailing the employee being unclassified.

Early replies (first 3)

62172413
>>62172412

62172414
>>62172413
kek

62172420
>>62172413
post her tits are they big and nice?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62173170
>>62172448
>>62172413
>>62172412
this is the least believable fanfiction ive ever read

62173174
Imagine raising your daughter and she moves out and you see her in the paper years later as she's apparently raped(pegged) and completely dominated another man to the point he cried. Would you be proud?

62173189
>>62172412
i want a woman like this to suck my 36 year old cock but without all of the gay femdom shit

62173190
>>62173000
Only /biz/.

They're used to getting fucked.

62173198
>>62172413
>I bet your little Asian, fish head, wife doesn't have these cannons
>*pops her titties out all theatrical like*

62173256
>>62172413
>>62173170
Hahahahahahaha

62173290
>he's erect?
>poomp him.

62173312
>>62172412
Women bosses are a jok...ACK!!

62173336
>>62172412
>>62172413
>>62172448
THIS DUDE IS LYING THATS SOME FUCKED UP MALE FANTASIES

62173338
>>62172412
This would never happen to me because women are afraid of me.
>as they should be

62173349
>>62172413

62173364
>>62172412
I'm applying for the job

Wish me luck

62173371
>>62172454
They call her snatch Hairy Hajdini cause it makes asian cocks disappear

62173376
is this how all albanian women are or is it just this one

62173472
>>62173376
It's not you. All Albanian women are hairy af.

62173509
>>62173364
>Lorna Hajdini
>horny hadji
I can't unsee it

62173528
>>62172413
>LITTLE AZN FISH H3AD WIFE

62173538
>>62173371
how do I upvote on here

62173540
My steak is too juicy and my lobster is too buttery wahhh

62173565
>>62172413

62173615
some men have all the luck :(

62174188
>The advances grew more explicit from here as Hajdini invited Doe for drinks and upon refusal, allegedly issued a threat: "If you don't f**k me soon, I'm going to ruin you, never forget, I f**king own you."
>"I f**king own you! I will make you pay. Do you think you're going to be in good standing if you do not have me in your corner. You really think [management] want some Brown boy Indian leading originations? If you don't f**k my brains out tonight, I'm going to sabotage your promotion."
Does she hire unmarried white men?

62174264
>>62172413

62174276
>>62174188
She made him her jamboy

62174280
>>62172413
wtf I love women now?

62174290
>>62172413
How exactly is this a bad thing?

62174441
>>62173336
It would be believable if he was a Chad but he's a jeet kek

62174448
>>62172413
>I bloody rape u bitch, show penis

62174581
>>62173064
4chan is shockingly gay all the time

62174634
>>62172413
>On June 9, 2025, Doe says he received a voicemail from someone claiming to be a manager at the company, telling him he wasn’t welcome back because of his skin color.
>Another caller allegedly threatened to contact US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) about him and his family.
>He claims he was later reprimanded and locked out of all company systems and placed on involuntary leave.
>A spokesman for JPMorgan Chase said in a statement to the Daily Mail: “Following an investigation, we don’t believe there’s any merit to these claims.
>“While numerous employees cooperated with the investigation, the complainant refused to participate and has declined to provide facts that would be central to support his allegations.”
Everyone replying to this post deserves a "Fell for jamboy cuck fanfiction" award.

item.title: I F U C KING SUFFER IN DENVER REEEEEEEEEE — 15 replies — 60.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
I F U C KING SUFFER IN DENVER REEEEEEEEEE

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-04-30 17:45 UTC

OP

I F U C KING SUFFER IN DENVER
REEEEEEEEEE

Early replies (first 3)

62173936
>>62173926
Trust the plan goy

62173941
>>62173926
gas in california is over $6 right now, you have it easy all things considered

62174058
>>62173926
Its 9.35 in Germany if you calculate it in your weird metric. But the median net salary is only 40k dollar for ful time work.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62174083
>>62174058
>in germany

62174105
>>62173926
>>62173941
>>62174058
You deserve it

62174118
>>62174058
Don't you guys get to ride trains everywhere and get your daily dose of diversity?

62174126
>>62174058
You voted for parties that dismantled your nuclear energy infrastructure, so you dont get to complain about energy costs, lmao

62174252
>>62173926
>Downing Street
>driving while texting
>saying a stinker gas station in the middle of Denver is expensive

Nigga are you retarded?

62174259
>>62173926
try Indiana lmao

62174382
>>62174259
Why would they name a whole state after India?

62174390
>>62174382
Because we are the true arians saaaaaaaaar

62174505
>>62173926
yeah well, it the los angeles area its over $6.00 a gallon now.

62174544
>>62174259
Really sad I passed up the 4.17 I saw yesterday
Where's that jackass who said it was only $4 and that wasn't even that bad?

62174560
>>62174252
I’m not driving all the way to Arvada for gas faggot

62174600
>>62173926
That's half what we pay in Europe normally.

item.title: WE EATIN GOOD TONIGHT — 11 replies — 44.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
WE EATIN GOOD TONIGHT

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-04-30 17:58 UTC

OP

cryptoniggers miss out on all the good plays
enjoy your rugpulls. as usual crudechads stay winning

>will be fullporting the retracement

Early replies (first 3)

62172382
>>62172378
I really don't understand how crypto zoomers stay in one asset class, thinking anything else is for boomers. They don't understand how to use options to get the same kind of leverage that used to be possible in crypto back in 2017.

62172386
Trump and his army of fake news faggots on twitter caused me to miss out on the entire run up

62172392
>>62172382
stocks/crypto are for the uneducated poors
simple as
being addicted to losing is real
if getting rugged for the hundredth time didnt make you rethink how you interacted with the markets, you werent meant to make it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62172447
>>62172378
>Brent just hit $124
lmao this shit will be $130 by morning

62172458
>>62172447
doubt it my negro
it will take a day or two
gotta retrace for the (special people) to enter
i am about to enter short

62172489
>short it

62172517
>>62172378
>as usual crudechads stay winning
below 2008, the year before bitcoin's existence

62172532
>>62172517
price != movement
movement is where money is made
i wouldn't expect a cryptogoy like yourself to know this, given you retards baghold shitcoins that only crab

>we are back in

62174090
crudechads stay winning. you saw it here folks

62174614
>>62172378
Oh no no no no lmao

62174641
EURUSD printed heavy

item.title: MSFT — 10 replies — 40.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
MSFT

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-04-30 17:45 UTC

OP

We're spending shittons on AI
We've shown great earnings for this quarter
We're laying off people just like media told us you want us to

WHY. TF. are you not buying our stocks?

Early replies (first 3)

62174349
It's not fair.

62174377
i got laid off from microsoft and my MSFT stocks are dumping kek

fuck this company seriously

62174400
I have been buying since it was at 370 my max price is 500. Wall Street is retarded and so are retail investors looking to make a quick pump off of earnings. Just stay the course and keep buying eventually it will skyrocket again just like it did when it when from 367 to 420 in a two week span.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62174414
>>62174400
Thanks bro. I did it last time in 2000 and it went brilliantly. I got ALL my money back just 15 years after.

62174418
>>62174256
>Xbawks is dead.
>Windows 11 is trash.
>Gamers are switching Linux if they're not completely retarded, who then find out that LibreOffice works just fine, and kill their Office 365 subscription.
>Companies switching away from GitHub due to service outages
>Companies switching away from Azure due to service outages
>Companies switching away from MS Teams and Outlook back to Google which offered major incentives and discounts to switch in the past year.

62174419
>>62174414
they wont let the markets dump anymore

you can buy a stock for cheap during two weeks max and then it pumps back to new ath

62174447
>>62174418
>due to service outages
B-b-but AI was supposed to replace SWEs and increase speed the code is shat out.

62174464
>>62174414
We are still up nearly 8% on the month we are still early in the AI adoption cycle, the internal estimates and metrics look fantastic. The AI build out is already increasing revenue, once the cap ex slows in a few years there will be a crazy amount of cash being shoveled on top their balance sheet. Being honest I was thinking that the lack of exclusivity to develop Microsoft azure and other cloud services on open AI would have hurt the stock more than a small blip on the pre market.

62174593
>>62174256
I will never put my money into a company with an Indian CEO

62174598
>>62174447
Even Anthropic is suffering from outtages. Their uptime is like 98%. Keep in mind, that means for a given year, you can expect the service to be down for just over 7 days. That's terrible.
And a lot of this kind of outage started when companies pushed hard to use AI coding.

item.title: >got $6k in student loans >school fully paid already >community college, live with parents, work part time Should I inve… — 3 replies — 12.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>got $6k in student loans >school fully paid already >community college, live with parents, work part time Should I inve…

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-04-30 17:46 UTC

OP

>got $6k in student loans
>school fully paid already
>community college, live with parents, work part time
Should I invest it or just give it back? Don't feel like laying $30 a month in interest. Have it in a HYSA but still

Early replies (first 3)

62174548
>>62174499
The only question you should be asking is "Can I use this money to generate more than I am paying in interest?" If the answer is no then pay it back, if the answer is yes then keep the loan open for as long as possible.

62174563
>>62174548
That's what I want to do but I don't know anything about investing beyond looking at stock price charts a bit. If the economy doesn't tank then it seems like I'd be guaranteed to make more than the interest right? The interest rate is 6%

62174604
>>62174499
depends what the interest is and what returns you expect from investing $6k instead. Anytime in the last 6-7 years you would have been better off just investing it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: I CANT STAND WAGING HOW THE FUCK DO PEOPLE DO THIS FOR 30+ YEARS???? — 44 replies — 28.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
I CANT STAND WAGING HOW THE FUCK DO PEOPLE DO THIS FOR 30+ YEARS????

Open thread • Replies: 44 • Updated: 2026-04-30 16:26 UTC

OP

I CANT STAND WAGING HOW THE FUCK DO PEOPLE DO THIS FOR 30+ YEARS????

Early replies (first 3)

62165377
>>62165360
Become an overnight security guard with a site in a rich area that’s internal (you’re inside a building).

The golden goose is MAG7 tech companies. I’ve literally and unironically done security for google. Max comfy

62165379
>>62165360
I do. I work like ~5 hours a day and play on my phone while eating a ton of corporate junk food and hitting on the co-workers for the rest. Must be a skill issue.

62165445
>>62165360
E Z ly
U just week

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62165811
>>62165360
I got rich on my own and then went to a government job for fun, prestige. Agreed.

Especially if you're not making bookoobucks it'd be soul crushingly hellish to earn baby money in some bleh position, a really significant amount that goes to paying for transportation, food and clothes specific to the office.

It's especially wild for women to do this shit in Jewish daycare when they could just stay home and between the not-commuting, the better home make meals

62165817
>>62165360
WFH at least hybrid solutions or fully remote, 40hr contracts MAX and 35hr ideal, im using 20hr+ a week to put into my own businesses and side hustles to supplement my income and eventually if fortunate enough replace my job.

62165830
>>62165377
What is the pay and bennies like? Wouldn't all the tech companies just automate security?

62165918
>>62165811
Women enjoy keeping society running.

62166277
>>62165811
Women on average are a bit less smart than men, but this means there is a giant glut of midwit women more than midwit men, and the midwits especially fall for Jewish and feminist talking points.

62166475
>>62165379
We have a room at work with big comfy chairs where we all sleep and watch movies, we work 13hrs but at the most actually go and do 3 hours of work.

62166487
>>62165830
>Wouldn't all the tech companies just automate security?
they're fucking retarded, anon

62166489
Wagies are spiritually unwell to do what they do. I pray for them nightly.

62166493
Their soul slowly erodes and they become hollow shells of who they used to be.

62166854
>>62165811
Being a SAHM is actually harder than doing nothing in the office all day.

>But what about the mind numbing boringness!

Remember women are great at socialization and finding things to talk about. Unlike a man who will become le office space women just find ways to get through the boredom. I'm not justifying their behavior, I just know that the average western woman isn't as tough as her ancestors 100+ years ago.

62166949
>>62165360
Idk. My job is really good and I’ve been doing it 15 years, the only job I’ve ever been able to do this long, and it’s still hell.

62166970
>>62166949
Same, my job is good for what it is. I've only been in the workforce for 5 years and I think I'm going to kill myself.

62167031
>>62165377
You’re essentially lower class.
>>62165806
When you realize 99% of people are born to work.

62168374
>>62166493
I fear that is already happening to me :(

62168766
>>62166949
>>62166970
Sounds like no matter what you did, you’d still bitch about everything.

62168822
my job is ok, but it's annoying to have to come in when I could do it all remotely, too bad I can't quit and neet but I like my lakehouse and boat too much to give them up.

62168835
Idk, I work 18 hours a week as a teacher for 2000€ and it's already too much work, how do you guys do 40 hours a week I will never understand

62171668
>>62165360
>HOW THE FUCK DO PEOPLE DO THIS FOR 30+ YEARS????
1) they have low standards
2) they'r NPCs just following orders
3) they hate every minute of it but are too scared to end themselves
4) they hate every minute of it and use that hatred to keep going
5) they hate every minute of it but are too scared to take risks

62171714
>>62165830
And how will these cameras and locks stop criminals?
Human presence alone deters 90% of potential theft.
>t. zoom zooms and niggers see me and v line the other way

62172531
>>62165360
The trick is you don't live long enough to ever really finish. it's a shell game where you believe that at the end there is something better waiting for you when really if you didn't have it to begin with you were never going to have it.

62172580
>>62165377
>I’ve literally and unironically done security for google.

How would you do it figuratively and ironically?

62172962
if you hate your shit do something else. people do it 30 years cause they dont hate it enough to stop

62173033
>>62165360
Find a good job.
I am slaving for shareholders but we have fun and the pay is not bad.

62173103
>>62165360
seriously, become black, get money from gob, steal and rape white goys and be recognized as an eternal victim that deserves everyone's favors and sympathy

62173916
>>62165647
I would rope if I have to work in an open plan office like that again.
For me, it's full WFH now or nothing.

62173930
>>62168835
this also jelly about the 18h. currently at 32 and that shit is borderline doable. dont know how I was able to do 40 the first few years. retards are basically throwing their life away for 15-20$ an hour. you cant make this shit up and at the end of the month their bank account still ends up being at 0 lol

62174044
>>62168835
I am a farmer and I choose how much I work most of the year. I have also worked in factories so I know what a 40 hour week is like. After I work 6 hours in a day I really want to be done and think about offing myself. If I do no work at all in a day I feel useless and think about offing myself. I think 3-4 hours of work per day is the sweet spot. It is just enough to feel like I accomplished something but not too much that I hate my life.

62174065
>>62165360
It could be worse. You could be a professional.

I'm in litigation hell.

62174236
>>62165360
I'm in the process of becoming Uberneet
>100% VA rated
>Medical retirement from fed job
Can't stand it anymore. Fuck them all

62174313
it's not sustainable, you gain weight, sleep deprivation in the norm etc.

even if you make it retirement age of 68yo, you gonna have a heart attack year after retiring because that 35 years of waging taking toll on body

you need to have a remote job at minimum. but preferable something like trading or playing poker in Pattaya isntead of waging ofcourse is the optimal. me have never had a proper job after some summer jobs, it was horrendous counting the minutes and watching clock to hit 4pm to get home

item.title: >tfw fell for the NEET meme how the fuck can you guys endure this? — 113 replies — 25.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
>tfw fell for the NEET meme how the fuck can you guys endure this?

Open thread • Replies: 113 • Updated: 2026-04-30 13:29 UTC

OP

>tfw fell for the NEET meme
how the fuck can you guys endure this? it's so boring and depressing, I unironically miss my wagecuck 9-5

Early replies (first 3)

62156768
I would unironically wagecuck still if I was able to take vacation whenever I want. I don't enjoyed scheduling things like that or requiring permission.

62156775
>>62156751
I became a neet because of crippling social anxiety, not out of choice.
I suspect many are the same.

62156779
>>62156751
see you fell for it without having any money, I did that once and then realized that it costs money to do anything other than sit in front of a screen all day every day

Depending on where you live, even going out for a walk will cost you bus fare or gas to get to a decent park. Never felt so trapped, now if I had money to go out and do things like camping or fishing or even just cook nice meals then I would have been a lot happier

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62164110
>>62156751
the NEET life is a perfect mirror.
if you are depressed and bored as a NEET, you are simply meant to be a slave.
There is nothing else to say.

62164118
>>62156795
this is the move, anon.
im an electrical engineering student and my plan is to take my intern cash and start a biz while working remote somewhere.
good luck

62164142
>>62156838
Let me guess, your hobbies are going on 4chan and masturbating

62164460
>NEETs when you ask them to show you some of the art and projects they "have time to create since they're not a slave like you"

62164470
>>62164460
i've beaten my favorite game nearly 5 times in the past month and wrote some genderbent DEI thot getting raped and mindbroken
how 'bout u?

62164922
>>62156751
simple i wasn't born a slave with a pink id

62165197
>>62164460
Is it so difficult to grasp why somebody who isn't compelled to conform to working their whole life is also not compelled to try and impress somebody who is?

62165794
>>62156775
yeah i never had a job because i keep sperging out in the few interviews i get

62165803
>>62164460
I just feel bad for their Mom's more than anything.

62165810
>>62157256
AI is based and does the stupid shit I don't want to do
sucks for the accountants that get left out, great for the ones that survive. Bookkeepers / entry level on suicide watch.

62166342
>>62156871
hobbies cost money

62166357
>>62164460
Why would I need to prove you how productive I am. I could rest an entire life and it wouldnt change much about the superiority of the NEET lifestyle.

62166361
>>62156751
Back when I was a neet many years ago I felt like such a god damn loser during the week when all the wagies were off waging. It was pretty bad for my psyche. Looking back those were some of the best days of my life. Especially when I had some good weed. Getting high, smoking cigs, and playing black ops. Fuck those were the glory days

62166616
>>62165197
>>62166357

62166678
>>62156751
>I'm bored with my infinite free time with infinite access to infinite materials online
Unironically kill yourself you worthless braindead carbon emitter
You were born to be a spineless barely sentient farm hand who does nothing but work and eat and die alone for someone else but you were born too late even for that

62166894
>>62158971

62166973
>>62166678
So I actually use the internet to achive productive things. Did research on drones and electric bikes. None of this matters if you have no money to follow through.

62167037
>>62163096
>cured me but dick no longer works
This is me with tramadol.

62167148
>>62164118
>electrical engineering student
unless you are working on boner inducing projects or at an ivy league, i suggest changing majors. these jeets are taking all the jobs

t. EE

62168741
>>62166894
>Got paid $12k to speak at a university
Boomers really did have it easy
Insane how many more opportunities old people have compared to the current generation

62168749
>>62156751
>how the fuck can you guys endure this? it's so boring and depressing, I unironically miss my wagecuck 9-5
You're a failed normie and you're not mentally wired for long term NEET life. Not really saying this to attack you, but it's true. Long term NEETs need some schizoid adjacent type condition, not just any anon can do this, despite a lot having been meme'd into it.

Go back to normie life. It's psychologically necessary for you, it's not a retreat or act of cucking.

62168769
>>62156751
Are you financially set? Can you live off your investments? Big difference between a broke and a rich neet, even between a modest and a poor one. I'm a poor semi-neet (part-time shitty job) and sometimes I genuinely want to kill myself, but mostly because I'm broke.

62171342
>>62156751
>Oy vey, NEETing is bad, understand!!?? Waging is good.

62171475
>>62156751
I would love to join the NEET game, get a hobby, join a club. Make your home cooler. Develop a skill for fun, even if it's just a particular video game.

You sound like the faggots who want wfh to end just because you're bored/boring or hate your home life.
Don't be that kind of faggot.

62172015
I got the job and am still a sexless anti social.
What now?

62172051
Basketball American NEETS have vibrant social lives. You are just a boring loser with or without a job.

62172174
>>62156871
this
>>62159344
so just be bored for a few hours you overstimulated faggot

62172195
>>62156751
Honestly OP, if you don't invest your time in passive income from social media you're retarded.
Generating content for stupid children or boomers is easier than ever, and with no apparent hobbies why not develop passive income streams

62172363
>>62171342
The amount of retards like this that unironically think that not NEETing aka being in work, education, or training is somehow a jewish scheme is proof that we need to cull the weak and comfortable.
100 years ago there was no disability from the government. Hell, even 60 years ago.
Your ancestors worked much more for much less. They absolutely did complain, you will never hear that but no one in history is content. Only NEETS are content. Being content means giving up on living.
Hardly any true NEETs exist, and hardly any would need to be killed/exercised. But those who do are far gone and deserve death, for they are not living.

62173517
>>62172363
False
There have always been beggars who chill all day.

item.title: High IQ thread — 9 replies — 13.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
High IQ thread

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-04-30 17:18 UTC

OP

You wake up one day to find you have become a wop. From a financial perspective, what's the first thing you do (after beating your wife of course)?

Early replies (first 3)

62174329
>>62174315
italians can pass as jewish so if you play it right it can be advantageous

62174332
>>62174329
I think you have a point there, anon

62174344
>>62174329
Italians sometimes have a jew nose but do not have a jew mouth nor brow, unless they are Italians of jewish lineage. If your jewdar is well tuned you can spot the difference immediately. You wouldnt be able to fool a jew, but you might be able to fool those who are not aware

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62174370
>>62174344
i am half italian and a lot of people think I am jewish but maybe it's because i am half white too

62174374
>>62174370
i hear this from jewish people by the way not just goys I think it's my mannerisms too

62174394
>>62174374
My family is from eastern europe and everyone thought i was jewish in college because I went to the university of maryland and liked pickles.

62174475
“Are you Jewish?”
“No.”
“Oh so you must be Italian.”

I’ve heard this many times

62174508
Lean into it I guess. Get a nice slick fade cut, tan, wear a chain, but tastefully. Wear good clothes and be a gregarious person (but don't rile me up or I might start snapping my fingers and threatening to break your knees).

62174513
>>62174475
>>62174370
The darker italian and sicilian people have more semite blood in them from being invaded by arabs. Same as many Spaniards. "Jewish" isn't a phenotype it's a meme club you're a member of if your mom was part of the club.

item.title: MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US and having the footage profession… — 36 replies — 10.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US and having the footage profession…

Open thread • Replies: 36 • Updated: 2026-04-30 14:22 UTC

OP

MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US and having the footage professionally edited with a pro-quality thumbnail attached. He says people don't do this because they either don't understand how easy it is to game the YouTube algorithm or they're just lazy. He says doing anything extreme on YouTube is still low-hanging fruit for fame and money, even now. So why haven't you taken his advice?

Early replies (first 3)

62161084
Even if that were true (doubt), doing youtube is gig-work, more akin to driving for Uber eats than the entrepreneurship that youtubers think they're engaging in. You can think you're "self-employed" until you do something that Google doesn't like, and then you'll find out who your boss really is.

62161086
>>62161076
The glownigger puppet wants more people to upload surveillance for the government online? And setting yourself up to be cancelled by mob mentality and no longer having actual skills for a job and a resume gap meaning you’ll never enter the workforce again?

62161087
i manage my own portfolio and fap all day, what makes you think im gonna get up and film my jew ass talking to a bunch of goyim for the entertainment of other goyim?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62161134
>walking across
More like driving across and foling yourself hiking for a few minutes

62161135
>>62161076
Oh yeah? So why he didn't get millions of views? Yeah I guess the classic goycattle quote "he didn't work hard enough" right?https://m.youtube.com/@theLIVINproject/videos

62161142
>>62161135
What part of 'professionally edited with a pro-quality thumbnail attached' did you miss?

62161154
>>62161142
>noooooo you must take a photo from your footage that is already in the video as thumbnail put some goycattle shit in it so goycattle watch it
God I fucking hate ecelebs and their "fans". First people to get the bullet before anyone else should be you and them

62161156
>>62161076
There's whores and then there is Mr Beast...

62161182
>professional editing
So you have to pay someone

62161185
>>62161084
same can be said for actors

62161541
>>62161135
It's not the editing though it wouldn't have hurt >>62161142 >>62161154
It's because they didn't talk to other people. Who wants to watch 2000 hours of two fags walking?
They were supposed to do interviews with cleetus and lashonda and other multiculti adventures

62162173
psychopaths should be culled at school age to prevent this kind of thing. Does he not understand you'd need to have money to do this in the first place and wouldn't be able to work for the half a year it took you to do this, along with it being physically grueling

62162184
>>62161076
im tired of seeing mr beast-esque channels all over youtube, what are some actual good channels?

62162212
>>62161154
you not liking something doesn't mean it's not effective, whiny little turd

62162225
>>62162184
>channels
is what ruined it, just look up what you want to see and click the most homely video

62162234
>>62161086
>resume gap = you'll never enter the workforce again
sounds like the economy's problem, call me when applying for jobs is based on competence instead of meaningless retard criteria

62162262
>>62161076
He is somewhat correct, but you have to do it right requires very expensive production team

62162269
>>62161076
you also have to not be able to grow a beard above your neck

62162303
>>62161076
how do you make the thumbnail then?
I make extremely low effort shorts and get thousands of views everytime

62162786
>>62161076
Can any terminally online brown zoomer please explain to the rest of us normie chads who this guy is?

62162805
>>62161076
>So why haven't you taken his advice?
why haven't you, faggot? kys

62163322
>>62162173
I think he's more getting at an idea more than specifically advocating people walk across the US. Remember he got famous for saying "Logan Paul" 500,000 times or something i forget the amount, he did a lot of endurance challenges like that which got him famous. I think he's more saying people do something ridiculous and hard and memeable and film it but it cant be easy because then there's no skin in the game its gotta actually be hard.

62164259
>>62162212
Is this Mrbeast? Who the fuck like genuinely what fucking retarded goycattle will watch a video just because he has thumbnail like Mrbeast? Like seriously? They are a fucking meme and odd. Everyone makes fun of them not praise them like it's some sort of magic that will help your videos. Mrbeast is a clown and his goycattle fans are sub 60 IQ

62164413
this jewish white nigger slave is an industry plant, i'm not trusting a single word coming out of its mouth

62164430
>>62161076
>MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US
Fuck it, call me Sam Porter.

62168164
>>62161076
>can get a million subs
This translates to how much in real currency?

62170693
>>62161084
you can say this about anything

62170796
>>62161122
This, so much this...

62171081
>>62168164
$60k to $1M a year depending on your output.

62171130
>>62161076
some buddhist monks did that and got ran over almost immediately

62171132
>>62162786
He's a 27yo YouTuber worth billions who clawed his way out of poverty just by grinding YouTube for five years, from 2012 to 2017. He leveraged his fame to build a burger company and a hugely successful candy company, and he plans to expand to video games and other industries.

62173729
>>62171132
He actually has more debt than money he claims

62173789
I just saw a black dude getting run over doing this lol. The car hit the breaks but was rear ended and that pushed him into the black guy. Am unsure if he died.

item.title: Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET? — 160 replies — 9.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET?

Open thread • Replies: 160 • Updated: 2026-04-30 00:43 UTC

OP

Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET?

Early replies (first 3)

62158601
>>62158557
Neet
Wagie can get some money to go out and have fun, and socialize.
might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

62158623
>>62158601
>might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

while waging at walmart is impossible

62158626
>>62158557
I prefer to be a neet, but ofc neither situation is perfect. Now if i was getting pussy then we'd be talking

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62166748
>>62165528
NEETs use inheritance to live extremely low-cost lives. It's quite doable in the modern world. The wagie trap is having a family that consumes resources like crazy, and also having status aspirations. Cut those things and you can live a nice cheap life. You have the internet for at-home entertainment and you can just exercise, meditate, learn to cook, chill with friends, etc.

62166810
>>62166578
That's just so not true. There are a fair amount of people graduating college and getting 60-80k per year jobs and getting a 2021 or newer corolla with ther 6 years of part time savings (part time summer jobs from junior year of highschool until college graduation). And those are just the 23-25 year olds not to mention the ones in their later 20's with actual savings from their full time adult jobs. That anon is right he is slightly behind but because he knows he is behind and is working hard to fix it he will likely be fine in 5-10 years since he knows his mistakes. You on the otherhand live in a fairytale world where "everyone my age with money got it from mommy". Nope. Sorry bud. Some people are skilled and actually have good jobs.

62167025
>>62165090
>being a neet sucks
Says the wagie

62167068
Have any of you started a "business" so you can pretend to your family that you have a job?

62167143
>>62167068
Yeah me. I tell them I run a hedge fund.

62167147
If you can make it to 40-50 as a NEET you have already won the lottery of life. But if you really want to live to be 75+ and retire into a nursing home then you have to work.

62167346
>>62167147
Retire in to a nursing home? What? lol

62167389
>>62167147
https://reddit.com/r/NEET/comments/ifcblr/today_i_became_a_40_year_old_virgin_neet_some/

62167410
>>62158557

62167440
>>62158601
>Wagie can get some money to go out and have fun, and socialize.


You're a robot born to entertain themselves to death while feeding the capitalist system. You're less than human

62167526
>>62167025
read my first post itt, i was a neet for 3 years

62167534
>>62167526
I have been neet my whole life. How about you?

62167920
>>62167534
>I have been neet my whole life.
That's just called being a woman.

62168012
>>62166519
No

62168184
really both suck. having something to do that you truly love its all that matter.

62168378
>>62158601
>might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago
Same woman has sucked a stranger's dick 10 minutes before she met you.

62168687
>>62158601
Lamo I had no idea I can cause this much seethe looooool
>>62168378
Nah, you say that cause you don’t wanna try.
>>62167440
Less than a human? You really think you use the gift of consciousness better, sitting at home, afraid to challenge yourself?
>>62160048
>humiliation ritual
And you think it’s not for everyone else? You really think everyone goes out and have crazy fun? Dude I seen guys who try and fail. Hell I try and fail every night, but that’s a thing about me. I am insane. Even when it fails, you try again. Until it works.
I think some people just deathly afraid of failing
Shit I WANTED to fail, cause failing would have been the proof that “I didn’t try, because it wouldn’t have work anyway, and being a neet was always better” but then it proved me wrong, that life can be fucking fun and easy at that, and I wasted YEARS, not having fun, not going out, not enjoying my life, listening and being tricked by social media to not even try.
I am almost 32, and my best years are gone being a loser neet who was afraid of trial and failure.

62168693
>>62158666
lol i got a great pc as a neet, you just didnt do it right

62168700
>>62168693
>>62163185
Dude, the amount of shit you can do on a super good pc is astronomical in comparison to a deck.
Ck3, and stellaris are cpu intensive specially in mid to late game cause of massive population boost all over the map, and I got myself a 5k computer to experiance all the glory of it, all my favorite mods available.
>>62159483
Yeah? Maybe. But just imagine this, the amount of motivation you will have, when a girl you just saw is now CRAZY into you, to the point of saying she loved you, keep trying to makeout with you, is just all over you, and then you realize oh no, I don’t have my own place, oh no, I got no money for a hotel, etc
You see what I am picturing here? I mean fuck, I wanna experience shit like that again and fully, and for that I need decent clothes and later a place of my own. a 8/10 moaning into your about ear how much she wants you, how much she loves and needs you, while you don’t have your place is the greatest motivator you can have in life, and if you want that motivation, you need to start waging a bit, so you can at least afford to go out and experience that massive boost of motivation.
Oh and guess how much porn I watched since it happened despite coming home blue balled and pissed? ZERO!
It’s a fucking testosterone shot straight into your brain that wakes you up to what a fucking lie you been living!
Social media lied and fucked me up, despite me not even having an Instagram, YouTube bullshit got me.
Don’t repeat my mistakes, and wake up wishing you didn’t do the shits I did (or didn’t)
I fucking WISH that world rejected me but instead it fucked me up by showing me how wrong I was.

62169232
>>62159483
better than she having you wait while fucking every other dude on a first date

62169261
>>62158666
Skill issue, Satan. There's much fun to be had for free.

62169348
>>62167534
>I only have one perspective so my perspective is right
Great now I know not to take your opinion seriously.

62169412
>>62158557
It's worse to be a wagie, obviously. Why would anyone ever think being NEET is worse? The whole point of working is to save up enough money to be NEET someday.

62169467
>>62169412
Yes and waging gets you more money and expedites that process so you can eventually neet. If you go neet mode with no money you're just suffering and can't truly enjoy life, and the "enjoyment" you have is just consuming media which makes you as much of a goy as a wagie.

62169540
>>62159267
Kierkegaard was based Dane, like Schacht.

62170345
>>62158557
depends on your situation. neet is better when you can actually afford it. if you need money then having a job is better no matter how soul crushing it is most of the time.

62170481
>>62159382
At least you know what checked actually means unlike that other dude.
But honestly man, why would my view be goyish? I am just saying biology will motivate you in life aka a hot woman
>>62169232
Fuck yeah dude. A hot woman keep saying I love you while pulling your hair, moaning and can’t stop herself from kissing you? Yeah I don’t care what she did with who before at that moment
>>62169261
Bro I had a one full terabyte of Skyrim and it’s mod enable on my shit laptop and was playing it without issue, so I have no trouble going around my laptop limitation. I could entertain myself with two absolutly simple games like xcom piretez or dominion 6 (both that I loved) then when I got bored I would used chatgpt to make assets and modded the game to my taste myself and started over, so no, I know how to not get bored either.
Problem is that a shit laptop is just not able to handle all the calculation of ck3 or stellaris (thanks to paradox shit programming) and total war had to be played on low settings.
I don’t like that shit. I don’t wanna be limited like this. Why would I limit myself to some fake and not my favorite, while I can go work, make some money, and get a pc that can handle ALL MY GAMES?
>>62169467
Yep. A smart wagie is a free man.
my problem with being a neet was always lack of safety net, but a wagie has that and he can get out of rat race faster.
>>62169412
Sure, we all love to be neet. But being a retired YOUNG neet, with money and your own car and place, is hard fucking work. (Or luck)
You can either sit on your ass and wish to be like that, have a good luck in lotto or stocks or crypto or work your ass and wage. In the end, the wagie gonna win, because he got more money to dump into stocks and crypto while a neet doesnt.
And god, I fucking WISHED I had my own place right now dude.

62170488
>>62170481
It’s still me, I don’t know why my id keep changing, probably cause I am a phonefag posting at work

62170497
Either has their pros and cons. Waging can get enraging and demoralizing but is a wonderful source of social, schedule, productivity, and income. Neeting has freedom and self-expression but can get so isolating and repetitive that it can make you break down mentally entirely over time.

Neeting and waging are two sides of the same coin. Balance in all things and you will find peace.

62171998
>>62158557
NEETs have dignity.

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-04-30 15:18 UTC

62171855

62171871

62171874

store oil in your balls

62173067

62173068
>>62173067

62173071
>>62171821
Most of Europe still has nuclear energy. The Germans screwed up.
Don't believe everything on the internet.
>>62171855
Heh

62173092
>>62173071
not us pizzafags, we had a (((referendum))) to block nuclear energy just after Fukushima in 2021

62173094
>>62171809
nothingburger and dropping as we speak. it would just take one trump tweet to nuke it back below 100

62173096
>>62173092

62173100
>>62173094
>dropping as we speak
is the drop in the room with us?

>muh Zion don will save us with his tweets
oh you're a MIGAbot lol

62173109
>>62173100
he's already done it before you retard he took the price from 119 to 80 in a single day. it's just now working it's way back up despite the crisis ongoing this whole time. he can easily do it again and keep resetting the clock

62173117
>>62173109
retard, your orange pedophile is ushering in the Great Reset. He doesn't give a fuck about tanking oil prices with his magical tweets

62173120
>>62173117
>muh pedohpile
>muh great reset
you are a bot

62173398
>>62171809
HaBibi it

62173452
>>62171843
>tschernobyl happening
>retarded greens cause mass paranoia
>many germs now want nuclear power gone
>germs buy cheap russian gas
>industry booms
>take in millions of young third worlders

>green lobby tells politics to shut coal and nuclear down
>politics actually goes along with it because germs want it

>saving lazy greeks costs billions too
>take in even more retarded third worlders
>people start to notice the shitshow
>population votes more and more conservative
>russia invades ukaine
>eu wants ukraine too
>eu commands germany to cut ties with russia
>eu commands ukraine to blow up nordstream

>electricity bills raise even more
>industry grinds to a halt
>social spending out of control
>old parties are used to rule and get free stuff

>chancellor promises to end socialism
>chancellor pulls a 180 and does even more socialism
>take on massive amounts of dept
>money runs out within months
>no more free stuff
>opposition doesnt even has to do anything as government turns into complete clownshow
>we are here

62173744
>>62173117
>NO YOU epstein files
>NO YOU great reset
Did the left just give up because they can't meme?

62174035
>>62173094
its going to 200 kiddo

item.title: doomer scam: most irrelevant nothingburger of the century — 24 replies — 7.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
doomer scam: most irrelevant nothingburger of the century

Open thread • Replies: 24 • Updated: 2026-04-30 14:43 UTC

OP

>labor market stable, jobs looking good; extraordinary hiring in march, probably in april too
>fed realizes this, keeps rates steady because there is no inflation
>consumers spending big time, projected to spend even more in the summer
>all MAG 7 companies beat earnings
>stock market at ATH
>economy at ATH
>oil cheaper than expected despite hormuz "crisis"
>Iran in fucking shambles as it turns out NOBODY NEEDS HORMUZ
>OPEC gets BTFO'd by lord Trump
wow, turns out blocking the straits helps the world more than it hurts it. what made you realize it was a scam strait?

Early replies (first 3)

62172011
>>62172001
bears missed the fact that 110 dollar oil today is 80 dollars 6 years ago. its no big deal.

62172080
>>62172001
You’re delusional. Oil is going to $400 and SPX is going to 2k.

62172102
>>62172080
Last time someone said this on /biz/ I laughed in their face as oil plummeted back down to $70.

The next day I posted asking where that idiot was that said oil was going to $200 and a bunch of street-shitting turd-skinned third worlder ESL's came into the thread trying to gaslight about how when they said oil was going to $200, they weren't talking about WTI futures, they were talking about buying the Indian basket lmaooo.

This board just reeks of disgusting turd worlders. I hate it here.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62172107
Can the plummeting gas prices come to central Indiana yet

62172109
>>62172001
they expected a 15% decrease (other places increased production and rerouted from homuz so its not 20% anymore) in global oil availability to result in 3x oil prices I guess

62172114
>>62172107
Bro it's like $4 and Braun already paused the gas tax. We're doing better than most of the country

62172141
>>62172114
Since when is $4 a good gas price unless you're selling gas?
If we're doing better than most of the country, I understand even more why people are mad

62172143
You don’t know how job numbers work do you

62172157
>>62172001
If you were looking for a top signal. Here you go.

62172177
>>62172001

Your stock markets fate is literally in the hands of brown people in the desert. The day they decide to start shooting missiles again oil goes to $150 overnight (probably more now since it closed 122 today) and the SPX limits down as the back end goes to 5.5%

Guess don’t get unlucky holding your hot potato call options?

62172178
>>62172157
Smartest guy in the room and he can't even read the thread: >>62172080

I think we have counterbalancing signals, smart guy. Let's see your shorts though, put your money where your mouth is and show your work.

You won't because you're a fucking pussy who doesn't believe anything he posts.

62172203
>>62172001
>The stock market can never go down again! Welcome to the GOLDEN AGE! ATH! ATH! ATH!
>t. some retard every time market instability pushed an ATH right before the crash

62172398
>>62172001
>doomer scam: most irrelevant nothingburger of the century
is this a new angle for the glowie narrative? that the war america lost is irrelevant and therefore can be forgotten quickly? that oil and fuel prices are not that expensive and will fall overnight? that the stock market is great, and therefore the economy is doing just fine?

I've read a lot of comments like this today. been wondering if they are automated. I guess this confirms they are posted by """AI""".

62172451
>>62172001
>please stop pumping oil $$$
>stop buying oil $$$
>you are treating crude like it is a tech stock
>we are doing fine, we do not need to go panic mode on oil
>"have you shorted your oil yet?"

I'm onto you and your tricks. I will put a long on crude when markets open.

62172471
in 2020 I lost my job making 80k a year. Just read that story abotu the 38yo female "executive" (why do women get promoted to CEO positions before they're even 40? sus)

Since then I've repeatedly almost made it on 10 different occasions but I always get fudded outu by SHIT like this and totally retarded doomer bears insisting this time it's time.

I don't know why because I get brainfog and emotional when I see my portfolio down 2000 bucks, so I'll set a sell at break even, get out 3 months later, then watch as it uptrends and breaks out.

I'm pretty sure by now the stress and isolation has given me brain damage. If I could just get two remote jobs I would do that instead but I'm not even allowed to be a tech wagie either.

62172587
>>62172001
I make fun of doomers aswell but Brent is mooning like crazy. Clearly the world needs that waterway.

62172589
>>62172587
it's only $114 you dumb nigger. Trump just needs to tweet an update on the situation and it will go down like last time.

62172659
>>62172589
Holy shit this board is full of retards

>muh Trump
He won’t do shit you retarded Migger

62172701
>>62172659
serious mode: you're a stupid piece of shit, july contract is $114 which has high volume, june contract which has lower but is more recent is $124. you're the retard, relying on chatgpt hallucinations:
>$130
braindead idiot. trump is an ZOG dementia patient.

62172723
>>62172701
Its talking about the EVENTUALITY of a $130 price spike (if the conflict continues) and the economic consequences of it you deranged nigger, it’s not quoting the current price of oil

I can’t believe people on here are so low IQ

62172728
>>62172723
>it’s not quoting the current price of oil
you mean spot you absolute brainless negroid.
>I can’t believe people on here are so low IQ
yeah I cant believe "people" like you exist. look up what backwardation is

62172732
>>62172659
Trump tweets will send it down 40 dollars you dumb nigger.

62172742
>>62172728
>>62172732
>oil spiking at record highs is a nothingburger everything will go back to normal in 2 more weeks!
Begone you dumb Miggers

62173877
>>62172732
Well when is he gonna do that

item.title: HAPPENING: Fertilizer Shortage Causes Supply Value to 2x — 22 replies — 3.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
HAPPENING: Fertilizer Shortage Causes Supply Value to 2x

Open thread • Replies: 22 • Updated: 2026-04-30 11:55 UTC

OP

The Iran war is setting up a shortage of urea fertilizer, which is already driving up prices, and will disrupt the food supply, sooner or later.

The world fertilizer market is worth, roughly, 290 Billion UDS according to fertilizer.com, and 30% of the world supply moves through, and is currently blocked within the straight of Hormuz. In the past month, the price has doubled, from roughly $400 to $720. Which means that the big money is yet to be made, we are Early.

Anons could speculate in high Nitrogen fertilizer and profit from the misery and poverty of the 3rd world to line our pockets, and laugh in our mustaches and cigar smoke

Early replies (first 3)

62172095
Oh no the third world will starve to death? Not my problem.

62172132
>>62172085
I got your urea... RIGHT HEEERE!
*pees on u*

62172159
>>62172095
Not your problem, your opportunity

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62172166
>>62172085

62172345
>>62172159

62172376
>>62172345

62172480
>>62172085

62172505
>>62172085

62172715
>>62172085
Wait until you hear about the glyphosate crisis that will food prices 20X L O L

62172745
>>62172505
Your brain on AI lol.. anon, what is required to make urea?

62172749
>>62172095
>Not my problem.
Those billions of jeets are all going to migrate to your country, and specifically your neighborhood.

62172751
>>62172749
Most of them will drown on their way here which makes it a good thing.

62172752
>>62172505
The strait is literally BLOCKED lmao

>Omg guys 3 ships passed the strait (down -95% from pre war levels) this means the strait is open!!!
retard lol

62172754
>>62172095
Hundreds of millions of people will migrate to Europe and the US. Do you think they will stay in their own country?

Welcome to the Great Reset

62172758
>>62172754
>Great Reset bad
Midwit take.

62172770
>>62172758
>Jews and shabbos goyim at the WEF having total power is…LE GOOD!

62172774
>>62172085
I should have gone all-in on agri futures

62172794
>>62172770

Midwit.

62172812
>>62172794
You cannot profit, thats the whole aim of their game.

62172816
>>62172745

62172817
>>62172812
I'm up 200X L O L

62173260
>>62172745
Couldnt we just syphon off all the Urea from the Ganges? Indians would make bank!

item.title: HOOD is literally on sale right now. If you aren't buying it I'm just gonna assume you're retarded and hate money — 8 replies — 3.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
HOOD is literally on sale right now. If you aren't buying it I'm just gonna assume you're retarded and hate money

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-04-30 15:35 UTC

OP

HOOD is literally on sale right now. If you aren't buying it I'm just gonna assume you're retarded and hate money

Early replies (first 3)

62169148
>>62169069
You're right

62169423
-50% from ATH.
Buying at -85%

62169498
>>62169069
Hell naw you dumb baggie. It's still trading higher than it was like 2 weeks ago. I have a limit order for 5/1 $66 cash secured put but I might cancel because I see this garbage going below $60 by the end of this week.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62169524
>>62169069
Just bought

62169636
>>62169069
>>62169498
>>62169524
>>62169423
Can you faggots invite me to your TG group so I can join these scams early?

62170080
>>62169069
I bought big bags ~$16 and sold >$100. AMA

62173603
>>62170080
i got bags at $8 and sold them at $10, truly, a victory

62174103
>>62169069
Too expensive, their payment for order flow system scales linearly and number of users depends on overall sentiment on the market (extreme volatility is good for them, everything else loses them business, because retail investors just like gambling).
